question: Can a fixed 0.3x mature-liquid spot bottom-3 realized-volatility portfolio with an own-positive-trend filter remain profitable and risk-bounded across sequential untouched evaluation and confirmation periods?
relationship_to_prior_work: Transparent conservative-risk follow-up to the exposed 0.5x trend-filter study; development is calibration evidence only; parent evaluation and confirmation were unopened at checkpoint time.
selection: bottom 3 realized volatility then retain only assets with positive own-window return
rebalance: first UTC daily open monthly using information through prior UTC close
development_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; max drawdown >-22%, >=2pp better than same-gross unfiltered low-vol and better than same-gross equal-weight; 60d/180d base >0; turnover <=18
evaluation_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; every calendar year positive; max drawdown >-18% and better than same-gross unfiltered and equal-weight; 60d/180d base >0
confirmation_gate: data PASS; 90d base/stress >0; at least one positive calendar year; max drawdown >-15% and better than same-gross unfiltered and equal-weight; 60d/180d base >=0; evaluation+confirmation compounded >0
holdout_release_rule: reuse already exposed development only; obtain evaluation data only after development pass; obtain confirmation data only after evaluation pass
large_data_policy: Git-external checksum-verified public data; manifests and identities retained under research
